svg.aria-label: How Mureka works: MusiCoT plans song structure, the O2 reasoning model self-critiques, then audio generates and exports as stems and MIDI into Ableton via Mureka Co
svg.text: Prompt, lyrics, or a hummed melody
Your idea in — text, your own lyrics, or a reference track
MusiCoT plans the whole song first
Global structure — intro, verse, chorus, bridge — before any audio
Evaluates its own plan and revises — more coherent song-form
The planned structure is rendered into a full mixed track
Illustrative · mechanism per vendor docs · not a benchmark
